interface: Terraform Enterprise REST API v2 (JSON:API) — workspace variables (stable)

request_headers.Content-Type: application/vnd.api+json on every request that carries a body

list_variables.pagination: NONE — current official docs document no query parameters for this endpoint; the response is the complete variable set in one document. (Catalog correction: an older internal runbook claimed page[number]/page[size] applied here; it does not.)

sensitive_semantics.docs_rule: a sensitive variable is written once and not visible thereafter
sensitive_semantics.read_rule: list/show responses carry value: null for sensitive variables
sensitive_semantics.reconcile_rule: the reconciler never reads or compares secret values; a sensitive current variable is in sync with a sensitive desired variable when key, category, hcl, and description match, and is rewritten (full attributes, including value) only when that metadata differs or when desired turns sensitive off

identity.rule: a variable's identity is the (category, key) pair — the same key may exist in both the terraform and env categories as two distinct variables

data.id: the variable external id, repeated in the body

plan_and_apply.ordering: each plan list is sorted by (category, key); apply executes all creates, then all updates, then all deletes in that sorted order
plan_and_apply.minimum_set_rule: only variables whose identity or compared attributes differ appear in the plan; in-sync variables generate no request
plan_and_apply.partial_failure: apply stops at the first API error; the error carries the operations already completed

errors.client_rule: every non-2xx response decodes into a structured error exposing the HTTP status and the parsed errors array
errors.not_found_masking: 404 Not Found is returned both for resources that do not exist and for resources the token is not authorized to see
